title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BORJA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO SAGBAYAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5696 / 53 OG No. 16, 5153 (August 31, 1957)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1741, June 21, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF BORJA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO SAGBAYAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of Borja, Province of Bohol, is changed to Sagbayan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 21, 1957.
